## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do today that isn't possible? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature clearly. How should it work from the user's perspective? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you tried any workarounds or found other tools that do this? -->

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] GUI
- [ ] YAML config
- [ ] Plugin system
- [ ] Report output
- [ ] Other: ___
